zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Corbet於1268年出生在英國諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓時，她的父親Walter Corbet33歲，母親Johanna De Stanton23歲。她於大約1290年與William de Strother在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年在英國英格蘭享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Corbet于1268年出生在英国諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓时，她的父亲Walter Corbet33岁，母亲Johanna De Stanton23岁。她于大约1290年与William de Strother在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年在英国英格兰享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Corbet was born in 1268, in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, her father, Walter Corbet, was 33 and her mother, Johanna De Stanton, was 23. She married William de Strother about 1290, in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1334, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Corbet est née en 1268, à Kirknewton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Walter Corbet, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Johanna De Stanton, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William de Strother environ 1290, à Kirknewton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1334, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Corbet 1268 in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Corbet 33 und ihre Mutter Johanna De Stanton 23. Sie hat um 1290 in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom William de Strother geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1334 im Alter von 66 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Corbet è nata il nel 1268 nel Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Walter Corbet, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Johanna De Stanton, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William de Strother circa 1290, nel Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1334, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Corbetが1268年にイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクニュートンで生まれた時，父Walter Corbetは33歳，母Johanna De Stantonは23歳であった。約1290年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクニュートンでWilliam de Strotherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年にイギリスイギリスで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Corbet(이)가 1268년 영국 노르스벌랜드 커뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Corbet(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna De Stanton(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커뉴턴에서 William de Strother(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Corbet nasceu em 1268, em Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Corbet, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Johanna De Stanton, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Strother aproximadamente 1290, em Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1334, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Corbet родилась в 1268 г. в местности кирнютон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Corbet было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna De Stanton, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Strother около 1290 г. в местности кирнютон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1334 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Corbet nació en 1268, en Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Corbet, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Johanna De Stanton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William de Strother aproximadamente 1290, en Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1334, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
